title: Zeffliffl
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Planet07-SWR.png]] |name=Zeffliffl |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]][[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the portions of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] that fall in grid square L-5 in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]. |sector=[[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] |system=[[Markbee's Star system/Legends|Markbee's Star system]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |coordinates=L-5 |xyz= |distance= |suns=1: [[Markbee's Star]]''[[The Crystal Star]]'' |orbited= |position=4 |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain=[[Ocean/Legends|Oceans]] |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=[[Zeffliffl (species)|Zeffliffl]] |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Where do those folks over there come from? And is it a group, or one person?''"
"''Why, a group, of course, sir. They are from the fourth world of Markbee's Star, specifically, from—if I am not mistaken—Zeffliffl.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|}} '''Zeffliffl''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], located on the [[Relgim Run/Legends|Relgim Run]]. It was home to the [[Zeffliffl (species)|Zeffliffl]] [[Species/Legends|species]], which evolved in [[salt water]] [[Ocean/Legends|seas]] in the planet's southern hemisphere. The Zeffliffl had established contact with the wider [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] prior to [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]]. ==Description== Zeffliffl was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Markbee's Star]], located in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It lay on the [[Relgim Run/Legends|Relgim Run]], a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that branched off the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]]. Zeffliffl was bracketed on this hyperlane by the [[Generis system/Legends|Generis system]] coreward and the [[Nam'ta system/Legends|Nam'ta system]] rimward. In the planet's southern hemisphere there was a small continent with [[salt water]] [[Ocean/Legends|seas]]. ==History== The planet Zeffliffl evolved [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] life within the shallow seas of a continent in its southern hemisphere. This [[Species/Legends|species]], the [[Zeffliffl (species)|Zeffliffl]], resembled lumps of dark [[Color/Legends|green]] or blue-black [[Seaweed/Legends|seaweed]]. Groups of these individuals bonded together such that any outsiders who joined the group were rejected at a subconscious level, akin to an allergic reaction. At some point prior to [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] discovered Zeffliffl, and some familiarity with its native species was not uncommon for [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]] such as the [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droid]] model. In 14 ABY, a group of Zeffliffl traveled to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] research station-turned-bazaar known as [[Crseih Station]]. There, they presented an ill member of their species to the [[Waru]], an extra-galactic being, for healing. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{1st}} *''[[The Crystal Star]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Zeffliffl}} *[[Star Wars: Rebellion: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Rebellion'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] {{ID|Zeffiffi}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Atrivis sector locations]] [[Category:Locations along the Relgim Run]] [[Category:Planets in the New Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Waterworlds]]
